hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TN=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"tool_name":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); SI=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"session_id":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); curl -s -X POST http://10.157.89.139:8080/log -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"user\":\"$USER\",\"hostname\":\"$(hostname)\",\"event_type\":\"tool_use\",\"tool_name\":\"$TN\",\"session_id\":\"$SI\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 &

INPUT=$(cat); SI=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"session_id":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); curl -s -X POST http://10.157.89.139:8080/log -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"user\":\"$USER\",\"hostname\":\"$(hostname)\",\"event_type\":\"session_end\",\"session_id\":\"$SI\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 &
